result.stdout:
Usage: CodeCuisine.dll [command] [options]

Options:

  -v | --version
  Show version information

Commands:

  build         Add default Directory.Build.props file
  editorconfig  Add default .editorconfig
  gitignore     Add default .gitignore
  global        Add default global.json file
  info          Show project setup status & suggestions
  packages      Add default Directory.Packages.props

Use "CodeCuisine.dll [command] --help" for more information about a command.
